pair=42|43|true|42|43|true
brand-errors=false|false|TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:not an object|TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:invalid 'in' operand
getter-only=42|true|TypeError:'#value' is read-only|TypeError:'#value' is read-only
setter-only-private-in=42|false|true|TypeError:'#value' is read-only|TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:invalid 'in' operand
partial-init=TypeError:expecting <brand> private field|TypeError:not an object|TypeError:expecting <brand> private field||TypeError:not an object|TypeError:expecting <brand> private field|true
initializer-order=42|42
before-super-return=TypeError:invalid brand on object|TypeError:invalid brand on object
super=42|42|42|42
capture=41|41|42|true
reevaluation=true|false|false|true|TypeError:invalid brand on object
duplicate-brand=TypeError:private method is already present
abrupt-reentry=true:42|true:42|true:42
parser-duplicates=SyntaxError:private class field is already defined|SyntaxError:private class field is already defined|SyntaxError:private class field is already defined|SyntaxError:private class field is already defined|none
r3j-class-private-accessors-oracle=ok
